name: The Fallen Standard
specialty: Specializes in navigating and disarming dangerous rifts, setting them apart as one of the most reliable teams for high-risk, high-reward jobs

members.name: Zorian Nightshade
members.note: Scars from a past battle with a rift monster cover half of his face

members.name: Aria Stoneheart
members.note: Her left arm is replaced by a mechanical limb, a constant reminder of a failed mission

members.name: Gavrik Riftbender
members.note: Rumored to have mastered a forbidden ritual to temporarily control rift energies

visual: They wear the distinct Glass Sigil colors - deep blue and silver - on their leather armors and carry a variety of unique tools for rift navigation. In public, they move with an air of quiet confidence, often drawing curious glances and whispers
reputation_note: The Fallen Standard, as they're known, are feared and respected for their rift navigating skills, but their association with the forbidden arts keeps them shrouded in mystery and intrigue
